items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the outcome of the persona scenario related to the audit trail of support actions. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or results that confirm the scenario behavior or the existence of an audit trail. Therefore, it is unclear whether the expected result of confirming scenario behavior or producing a failure report has been achieved.
